article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area

briefs.title: Manufacturers Can Now Sell Liquor by the Glass in Picnic Areas Under New Endorsement Rules
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation (s.34) now allows manufacturers to sell and serve their products by the glass in a designated picnic sale area, alongside existing consumption-only zones, with a combined 1,000 sq metre cap.
briefs.action_required: Apply via the liquor and cannabis licensing portal to add a sale area or convert your TESA to a permanent picnic area endorsement.
briefs.article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area
